question: Will the Gaza death toll be over 150,000 at the end of the Israel-Hamas war
textDescription: I will wait for at least a month after the war ends to try and get more reliable data. I reserve the right to extend the resolve date until reliable data is available.
newsShortReason: Multiple authoritative sources estimate Gaza death tolls between 70,000 and 75,000, with some studies suggesting higher figures.
newsKeyEvidence: A senior Israeli security official stated that approximately 70,000 Palestinians have been killed in Gaza since October 2023. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/world/2026/jan/30/israel-military-gaza-death-toll-broadly-accurate?utm_source=openai)) | A study published in The Lancet Global Health estimated over 75,000 deaths in the first 16 months of the war, at least 25,000 more than the official toll at the time. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/world/2026/feb/19/gaza-death-toll-higher-than-reported-lancet-study?utm_source=openai)) | The Geneva Academy of International Humanitarian Law and Human Rights reported that the death toll may have exceeded 200,000, citing a population decline of over 10% since October 2023.
